languages.text: "Блюстители смотрят на нас как на грязь под сапогами. Бойцы нервничают".
"The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."
languages.original_text: "Блюстители смотрят на нас как на грязь под сапогами. Бойцы нервничают".

traits.locale_text: "The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. The men are getting nervous."
"The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."
"I am itching to give some of the enforcers and other law officers a good thrashing. They look at us like we're dirt under their boots."
"The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. The men are getting nervous."
"The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."

languages.text: 「執行官や警察官など、一部の人たちを、いい具合にボコボコにしてやりたい。俺たちを、靴の底の埃のように見ているんだ」
languages.original_text: "I am itching to give some of the enforcers and other law officers a good thrashing. They look at us like we're dirt under their boots."

languages.text: "İnfazcılar bize çizmelerinin altındaki pislikmişiz gibi bakıyor. İnsanlarım geriliyor."
languages.original_text: "The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."

traits.locale_text: "İnfazcılar bize çizmelerinin altındaki pislikmişiz gibi bakıyor. İnsanlarım geriliyor."

languages.text: “那些执法者看我们就像看脚下的烂泥似的，让我的人感到紧张。”
languages.original_text: "The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."

traits.locale_text: “那些执法者看我们就像看脚下的烂泥似的，让我的人感到紧张。”

languages.text: "Die Enforcer sehen uns an, als wären wir Dreck unter ihren Stiefeln. Meine Leute werden nervös."
languages.original_text: "The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."

traits.locale_text: "Die Enforcer sehen uns an, als wären wir Dreck unter ihren Stiefeln. Meine Leute werden nervös."

languages.text: « Les prévôts nous regardent comme si nous n'étions rien de plus qu'une saleté sous leurs bottes. Mon peuple est inquiet. »
languages.original_text: "The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."

traits.locale_text: « Les prévôts nous regardent comme si nous n'étions rien de plus qu'une saleté sous leurs bottes. Mon peuple est inquiet. »

languages.text: «Los guardias nos miran como si fuéramos barro en sus botas. Mi gente está inquieta».
languages.original_text: "The enforcers look at us like we're dirt under their boots. My people are getting nervous."

traits.locale_text: «Los guardias nos miran como si fuéramos barro en sus botas. Mi gente está inquieta».
